section_title: Where a contract to give time to the principal debtor is made by the
content:
136. Where a contract to give time to the principal debtor is made by the
discharged
creditor with a third person, and not with the principal debtor, the surety is not
when
agreement discharged.

Illustration
third person
to give time
C, the holder of an overdue bill of exchange drawn by A as surety for B, and
to principal
accepted by B, contracts with M to give time to B. A is not discharged.
